name: tabsync
description: Extensão Chrome/Edge para sincronização e gestão de sessões de separadores.

scripts.build: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force dist | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Recurse -Path src/* -Destination dist/"
scripts.pack: npm run build && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item -Force tabsync.zip -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Compress-Archive -Path dist/* -DestinationPath tabsync.zip"

author: Pedro Guerreiro
